name: A Bit of Everything with Adam Grant

snippets.text:
1. Academic culture can prioritize tearing down others' work over building up ideas
2. Signaling intelligence by criticizing others' work may not always be productive
3. Building an idea can require greater intelligence than tearing it down

1. Star security analysts on Wall Street leave for new firms thinking the grass is greener.
2. On average, it takes five years to recover your star status after leaving for a new firm.
3. Taking your team with you when you leave a firm has no impact on your performance.

name: A Curious Mind with movie producer Brian Grazer

snippets.text: The key insight is that exposure to uncomfortable experiences, with the encouragement of someone supportive, can lead to building confidence and the ability to stand up to challenges and adversaries. Trying new things and overcoming humiliating experiences with determination can lead to newfound confidence and the ability to face and challenge the status quo. The message emphasizes the importance of constant exposure to discomfort, whether big or small, in order to build the habit of embracing the uncomfortable.
